content: Integration tests that spawn node subprocesses (execFileSync/spawnSync) cannot have their coverage collected automatically. Solutions: (1) Skip subprocess coverage — report only on test harness code, accept that src/ shows low numbers and document why. (2) Use NODE_V8_COVERAGE dir and pass it to child env in test helpers — requires modifying test helpers to forward the env var. (3) Use --import hook approach where coverage is injected via --require/--import. For agentmap-php v1.3, pragmatic choice is option 1 (report on what we can, document subprocess limitation) since modifying 25+ test files is out of scope.
